essential_assertions.text: assert(2 * (gi - 1) * (gi - 1) + 2 * (gi - 1) + 1 + 4 * gi == 2 * gi * gi + 2 * gi + 1) by(nonlinear_arith);
assert(gi * gi <= (gn - 1) * (gn - 1)) by(nonlinear_arith) requires gi >= 0, gi <= gn - 1;
assert(2 * gi * gi + 2 * gi + 1 <= 2 * (gn - 1) * (gn - 1) + 2 * (gn - 1) + 1) by(nonlinear_arith) requires gi <= gn - 1, gi * gi <= (gn - 1) * (gn - 1);

placeholders.original_text: assert(2 * (gi - 1) * (gi - 1) + 2 * (gi - 1) + 1 + 4 * gi == 2 * gi * gi + 2 * gi + 1) by(nonlinear_arith);
assert(gi * gi <= (gn - 1) * (gn - 1)) by(nonlinear_arith) requires gi >= 0, gi <= gn - 1;
assert(2 * gi * gi + 2 * gi + 1 <= 2 * (gn - 1) * (gn - 1) + 2 * (gn - 1) + 1) by(nonlinear_arith) requires gi <= gn - 1, gi * gi <= (gn - 1) * (gn - 1);
